findings.description: `BatchAction` is referenced in the source table under `handle()` description ('BatchActionとは異なり、データリーダーを使用せず') as a contrasting class, but it is absent from s1 hints. Including it would enable routing of comparison queries (BatchAction vs NoInputDataBatchAction).
findings.source_evidence: handle() row in template method table: ':doc:`BatchAction` とは異なり、データリーダーを使用せず、常に1度だけ呼ばれる。'
